TRR_API_URL.description: Canonical backend base URL consumed by TRR-APP and Screenalytics.

TRR_DB_URL.description: Primary runtime Postgres connection string for TRR-compatible reads and writes.

TRR_DB_FALLBACK_URL.description: Only intentional runtime fallback for the TRR Postgres lane.

TRR_INTERNAL_ADMIN_SHARED_SECRET.description: Shared internal-admin JWT signing secret across backend, app, and Screenalytics.

SCREENALYTICS_SERVICE_TOKEN.description: Compatibility fallback token for Screenalytics-to-backend auth during JWT migration.

SCREENALYTICS_API_URL.description: Legacy Screenalytics HTTP base URL kept for non-admin or legacy flows.
